name: Irregular Galaxy Core Photometry via Polygon ROI
description: Measure the photometric properties of the bright, irregular central core in the Ultraviolet Imaging Telescope (UIT) galaxy sample (uit_galaxy_sample.fits) using AstroImageJ. The measurement must include Area, Mean gray value, and Integrated density, based on a polygon selection of the core containing at least 6 vertices. Save the resulting measurement table to ~/AstroImages/measurements/galaxy_measurements.csv and the selection's XY coordinates to ~/AstroImages/measurements/roi_coordinates.txt. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
